overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural village and into surrounding wilderness. The character passes a large oak tree with hanged bodies, follows a lakeside path through a wooden gate, and continues uphill into forested terrain with distant stone ruins visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with thatched huts and wooden fencing

events.description: passing the large oak tree with hanged bodies suspended from branches
leaving village buildings behind, approaching lakeside with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village path wearing Wolf School armor, passing under the large oak tree

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with straw roofing on the left side of the path
rustic wooden post fencing lining the village path
massive ancient oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
multiple bodies suspended by ropes from the oak tree branches
low stone wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rural village setting with traditional thatched-roof huts and wooden fencing. Geralt walks along a dirt path toward a large oak tree with hanged bodies, passing stone walls and rustic structures before transitioning toward a lakeside area.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside trail with wooden fencing and gate structure

events.description: passing through the wooden gate structure with NPCs standing nearby
leaving the lakeside behind, beginning ascent into open grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the lakeside path, passing through a wooden gate structure with villagers nearby

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing near the wooden gate structure, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: calm lake water visible beyond the wooden fencing on the right
rustic wooden archway and gate spanning the dirt path
tall coniferous trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path runs alongside a lake with wooden fencing on the right, passing through a wooden gate where villagers stand. The scene transitions from the village to open grassland as the path curves away from the water and begins ascending uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland hillside with scattered trees

events.description: path curves left and continues ascending the grassy hillside
entering denser tree cover with stone ruins becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill on the winding dirt path through grassy terrain with scattered birch trees

entered.detail: rolling grassy hills covered in tall grass and wildflowers
sparse birch and pine trees dotting the hillside
ancient stone ruins visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into wide grassland hills with scattered trees and distant stone ruins visible. The path winds uphill through tall grass and wildflowers, transitioning from open terrain toward denser forest cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with ancient stone ruins and distant red structures

events.description: distant red stone ruins become visible through the trees on the left
moving through dappled sunlight and shadow under the dense tree canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path with ancient ruins visible through the trees, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees forming dense canopy overhead
weathered stone wall remnants alongside the path
large red-brick ruins visible through gaps in the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense forest with dappled lighting filtering through the canopy. Ancient stone wall ruins line the left side of the trail while distant red-brick structures become visible through the trees, suggesting approaching a new area or landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a somber rural village into an expansive highland landscape and finally into a dense forest. It begins on a dirt path among thatched-roof huts and stone walls, moving toward a large oak tree with hanged bodies before shifting toward the lakeside. As the camera passes through a wooden gate flanked by villagers, the scene opens from the lakeside settlement into wide, ascending grassland hills dotted with wildflowers and distant stone ruins. The trail then winds further uphill through the open terrain before turning into a dense forest where dappled light filters through the canopy. Finally, the path follows ancient stone wall ruins as red-brick structures emerge through the trees in the distance.
